definition:
ὕστερος, -α, -ον 
 [in LXX for אַחֲרוֹן and cogn. forms ;] 
latter, later: ἐν ὑ. καιροῖς, 1Ti.4:1 (on the reading ὁ ὕ., WH, for ὁ πρῶτος, see WH, App., in l). Neut., τὸ ὕ., used adverbially instead of ὑστέρως, afterwards, later: Mat.4:2 21:29, 32 21:37 25:11 26:60, Mrk.16:14, Luk.20:32, Jhn.13:36, Heb.12:11; with genitive, Mat.22:27.†
 (AS)
